title: NANGMAH TAWH PASIAN OMKHAWM TA HEN

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Nangmah tawh Pasian omkhawm ta hen,
A hong pi, a hong len dingin,
A tuu tawh hong kembit dingin,
Nangmah tawh Pasian omkhawm ta hen.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: I kimuh kik mateng,
Zeisu kiang kimu mateng,
kimu kik mateng,
Nangmah tawh Pasian omkhawm ta hen.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Nangmah tawh Pasian omkhawm ta hen,
A kha nuai hong liah hong dal in,
Nisim "Manna" hong vaak dingin,
Nangmah tawh Pasian omkhawm ta hen.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Nangmah tawh Pasian omkhawm ta hen,
Launa'n hong lungam sak ciangin,
Ang sung hong pom bikbek ding,
Nangmah tawh Pasian omkhawm ta hen.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Nangmah tawh Pasian omkhawm ta hen,
Itna nuai ah hong cing dingin,
Sihna tuihual satpaai dingin,
Nangmah tawh Pasian omkhawm ta hen.
